name: @rtl-safe-ai/browser-extension
description: Manifest V3 browser extension that applies local-only RTL fixes to AI chat interfaces.

scripts.dev: vite build --mode pages && vite build --mode content --watch
scripts.build: tsc --build && vite build --mode pages && vite build --mode content
scripts.preview: echo "Load the dist/ folder via chrome://extensions (Developer mode → Load unpacked)."
